title: Sony confirms its plans to eliminate physical discs on PlayStation and rations the sale of external disc drives
summary: The company reduces disc production and limits the purchase of disc drives to one per customer, generating criticism from politicians and media.

title: Video game media share their gaming lists for the July 4th weekend
summary: Various sites publish their recommendations and gaming experiences for the holiday weekend in the US.

title: Dragon Age creator David Gaider seeks funding for a new heist RPG
summary: The veteran writer presents a light-hearted heist game that could be decisive for his studio.

title: Danganronpa 2x2 delayed until 2027 and introduces a new game mode
summary: Spike Chunsoft's anticipated title suffers a significant delay, but its creator suggests fans play GTA 6 in the meantime.

title: Bandai Namco announces new content for Dragon Ball Xenoverse, including the final DLC for Xenoverse 2
summary: The company reveals future plans for the series and confirms that the final downloadable content for Xenoverse 2 will arrive on July 8.

title: A classic 2004 space strategy game can be obtained for free in GOG's summer sale
summary: GOG gives away one of the best sci-fi strategy games of 2004 during its summer promotion.

title: The Asus ROG Ally Xbox X, a $1000 all-round handheld, arrives as the best option on the market
summary: The new handheld console with Xbox collaboration offers high-end specifications and a high but competitive price.

title: Scrap Mechanic leaves early access after more than a decade and launches version 1.0
summary: The robotic survival game finally leaves early access with a complete update.

title: Junji Ito's new live-action series faithfully captures the terror of his comics
summary: The television adaptation of the horror master's works receives praise for its fidelity to the original material.

title: Counter-Strike: Global Offensive breaks player records after separating from CS2
summary: The standalone version of Global Offensive reaches historical concurrent player numbers on Steam.

title: Steam Machines suffer a hardware problem similar to the 'Red Ring of Death'
summary: Users report critical failures in Steam consoles that recall the well-known Xbox 360 error.

title: Street Fighter 6 director explains the controversial character choices for year 4
summary: The development team defends the season pass inclusions and responds to fan criticism.

title: Marvel Tōkon: Fighting Souls is blocked in 132 countries on Steam
summary: The Marvel and Sony fighting game is not available in a large number of regions, generating doubts about Sony's PC strategy.

title: Modders create a Fallout 4 mission in a weekend for charity, with Wes Johnson's voice
summary: A group of modders quickly developed a charity quest that features the renowned actor from The Elder Scrolls.

title: Escape from Tarkov creator promises the most realistic sci-fi shooter for 2026
summary: Nikita Buyanov previews details of his next title, ensuring it will surpass any other game in the genre in realism.

title: Solo Leveling confirms Beyond the System, the new film that will serve as a third season
summary: The popular manhwa series will have a feature film that continues the main story and already shows a first preview.

title: Capcom plans to bring Mega Man to an even wider audience
summary: The Japanese company seeks to expand the Blue Bomber franchise beyond traditional players.

title: Epic Games reaches a legal settlement with a former employee who leaked Fortnite information
summary: The developer settled the lawsuit against a contractor who had revealed confidential information about the popular game.

title: A metroidvania gets funded in 25 minutes and surpasses 600% of its goal on Kickstarter
summary: The promising game of the genre has caused a furor on the crowdfunding platform, multiplying its initial target by six.

title: STEINS;GATE: Octet of Shifting Space will come to the West for PS5, Switch 2, Switch, and PC
summary: The new title of the acclaimed visual novel series will launch on multiple platforms in Western territories.
